title: About Fable Psychology
body: I have been a psychologist since 2019, after completing my Masters of Professional Psychology. Since then I have worked across disability, defense and private sectors. I currently work at a successful private practice where I have found a fantastic niche for myself with trauma, neurodiversity and the LGTBQIA+ community. I am well versed in CBT, ACT and also utilise DBT, IFS and somatic tools.
